archive.title: Archive
archive.subtitle: Thinking about code, design, and life.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: About this blog and the person behind it.
about.projectDesc: Kome Blog is a modern, full-stack personal blog system composed of three parts: a public-facing blog, an admin dashboard, and a RESTful API backend.

articles.title: Articles
articles.desc: Marked-based rendering with highlight.js, KaTeX math, Mermaid fullscreen diagrams, pinned posts, reading time, auto TOC, one-click code copy, and tag/keyword filtering.

archive.title: Archive
archive.desc: All posts on a year/month grouped timeline with sidebar year navigation, scroll-to-year positioning, viewport-aware highlighting, tag filtering, and keyword search.

memos.title: Memos
memos.desc: Infinite-scroll microblog feed with pinned entries, relative timestamps, full Markdown rendering, statistics dashboard, and "On This Day" memories.

links.title: Links & Guestbook
links.desc: Card-style blogroll directory with keyword search, random visit shuffle, one-click exchange card copy, and Giscus-powered guestbook via GitHub Discussions.

i18n.title: i18n
i18n.desc: Full Chinese/English interface with one-click toggle, localStorage persistence, and Accept-Language API forwarding.

responsive.title: Responsive Design
responsive.desc: Mobile-adaptive layout with collapsible navigation menu, sidebar drawer, floating TOC bottom sheet, adaptive grids, and skeleton loading.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Overview cards for posts, memos, tags, and links with quick-add buttons and recent posts/memos at a glance.

content.title: Content Management
content.desc: Full CRUD for posts, memos, tags, and links with pagination, status filtering, keyword search, tag filtering, and sortable columns.

editor.title: Markdown Editor
editor.desc: CodeMirror-based editor with formatting toolbar, emoji picker, draggable split-view live preview, cover image extraction, and tag selector.

ai.title: AI Integration
ai.desc: One-click article summary (Chinese) and SEO slug (English) generation via configurable OpenAI-compatible API.

i18n.title: Responsive & i18n
i18n.desc: Full Chinese/English interface with one-click toggle, localStorage persistence, and mobile-adaptive layout with collapsible sidebar navigation and responsive tables.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.desc: JWT-based stateless authentication with remember-me, username/email login, first-time admin setup flow, and password strength validation.

rest.title: RESTful Endpoints
rest.desc: Full CRUD for posts, memos, tags, and links with pagination, full-text search, archive grouping, and unified response wrapper.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.desc: Stateless JWT with Spring Security, BCrypt hashing, username/email login, first-time admin setup flow, and configurable expiration.

ai.title: AI Integration
ai.desc: OpenAI-compatible wrapper via WebFlux WebClient for async summary and slug generation with configurable model and timeout.

db.title: Database
db.desc: MySQL with Flyway migrations, MyBatis-Plus pagination and soft delete, and Jackson-based JSON fields for social links and skills.

validation.title: Validation & i18n
validation.desc: Hibernate Validator with bilingual messages resolved via Accept-Language header and global exception handler for structured responses.

docs.title: Monitoring & Docs
docs.desc: Springdoc OpenAPI with Swagger UI for API exploration and Spring Actuator health endpoint for service monitoring.

guestbook.title: Guestbook
guestbook.subtitle: Leave a message, share your thoughts.
guestbook.notConfigured: Please configure Giscus to enable the guestbook.

post.outdatedWarning: This article was last updated over 6 months ago. Some content may be outdated.

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

sidebar.noOnThisDay: No memories on this day yet
sidebar.randomVisitDesc: Roll the dice and visit a random friend.
sidebar.setupDescription: Please visit the admin panel to complete the initial setup.
